title: oriastrum abbreviatum
intro: Oriastrum abbreviatum, also known as dwarf oriastrum, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the southwestern part of Western Australia. The medicinal properties of Oriastrum abbreviatum lie in its leaves and flowers, which are used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, colds, and respiratory problems, and its extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits and can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
